text: very expensive , very poor service from doctors

translations.sr: veoma skupo, veoma loša usluga od lekara
translations.sr_cyrl: веома скупо, веома лоша услуга од лекара
translations.en: very expensive , very poor service from doctors
translations.ru: очень дорого, очень плохое обслуживание от врачей
translations.de: sehr teuer, sehr schlechter Service von den Ärzten
translations.tr: çok pahalı, doktorlardan çok kötü hizmet
